value.found_quote: Code Review | ✅ Supported | Same automated PR reviews as github.com
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists "Code Review" as a supported GHES feature in the feature table, with the note "Same automated PR reviews as github.com," which directly matches the claim's description. The page also states this is available for Team and Enterprise plans and provides admin setup instructions for enabling Code Review on GHES repositories.
